anonymizedText:
[CANDIDATE_NAME] — QA Engineer.
Skills: Playwright, Jest, manual regression at [COMPANY_1].

profile.name: QA Engineer
profile.description: Web application testing with Playwright and Jest.

questions.question: Your CV omits HashiCorp Vault and Terraform experience required for this platform team — how have you managed secrets?
questions.rationale: The role expects Terraform and Vault but neither appears in the CV or job profile.
questions.suggested_answer: Candidate should explain infra-as-code and secret rotation.
